user.title: Gaming Status Setup
user.description: Enter your SteamGridDB API key to enable game cover art. You can get a free key at [SteamGridDB]({api_url}).

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Gaming Status can be configured.

init.title: Gaming Status Configuration
init.description:
You can update your SteamGridDB API key below.

**To manage your players, games, and exclusions, please click the 'Gaming Status' icon in your Home Assistant sidebar!**
